name: klipper-ops-skill-marketplace
description: Single-skill marketplace for compact Klipper printer host operations.

skills.name: klipper-ops
skills.description: Token-efficient Klipper printer host operations with bundled scripts for compact systemd snapshots, bounded journal logs, SSH, and printer_data/config backup, pull, push, and validation workflows.
skills.shortDescription: Compact Klipper host ops with bounded logs and reusable scripts.
